scripts.build: esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --external:fastify --external:@fastify/cors --external:@fastify/compress --external:@fastify/rate-limit --external:fastify-type-provider-zod --external:zod --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
